preferences._title_exclusions_note: Case-insensitive whole-phrase matches against the posting title (word-boundary, so an entry never fires on a substring inside another word). Keep entries phrase-level and unambiguous: this list is for postings that could never be one of your five roles, not for borderline cases, which the ranking handles. Ignored by the JSON parser; kept here as guidance only.
